title: Chinese Buddhist: Liuzu Tan Jing (Platform Sutra of Huineng) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Liuzu Tan Jing (Platform Sutra of Huineng)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Liuzu Tan Jing (Platform Sutra of Huineng)

translation.text: From Liuzu Tan Jing (Platform Sutra of Huineng): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
